title: Field-Status Registry
description: Per-dataset approval state for Qlib fields used in factor expressions. Formal validation, OOS test, and registry-publish stages refuse to consume any field whose dataset is not 'approved' (or whose status's allowed[<stage>] is false). Lives at config/field_registry/field_status.yaml. Plan PR 5 of the 2026-05-26 freeze plan.

statuses.description: Per-status stage allowlists. Every dataset references one of these by name.

datasets.description: Map of dataset_id → entry. Entries declare their status, optional reason, and either fields (explicit list) or field_prefixes (catch-all match).

unknown_field_policy.description: Behavior when a referenced field matches NO registered dataset. 'warn' allows the run; 'fail' raises FieldApprovalError. Conservative default: warn in screening/sandbox; fail in formal/oos/publish.

approval_log_path.description: Relative path to the append-only text approval log (default: config/field_registry/field_approval_log.jsonl).

approvals_dir.description: Relative path to per-promotion YAML evidence files (default: config/field_registry/approvals/).
